          },

            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"

          },

            "text": "    if (savedNotes) {"

          },

            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "    if (!saved) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "      const defaultState = createDefaultInventoryStatusState()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "      setInventoryState(defaultState)"

            "text": "      setBaselineState(defaultState)"

            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "    try {"
          },

            "text": "      if (parsed) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "        setInventoryState(parsed)"

            "text": "        setBaselineState(parsedBaseline ?? parsed)"

            "text": "        setSelectedBeanName(parsed.beanRows[0]?.name ?? '')"
          },

            "lineNumber": 322,

            "text": "        setInventoryState(defaultState)"

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import ExcelJS from 'exceljs'"

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {

          },

          },

          {

            "text": "const CUSTOM_CLIENT_OPTION = '__custom_client__'"
          },
          {

I've summarized the page navigation structure using a single App component with activePage state and conditional rendering. </details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2-fast)**_


Here is a concise report based on the current `app/src` layout.

---

### 1) Page switch model and page IDs

- **No router** (`/Users/parkcg/The Symbol_Edit/app/src/main.tsx` mounts only `App`). Navigation is **React state** in `App.tsx`.
- **`activePage`** is typed as `'statements' | 'meeting' | 'inventory'`, initialized from `localStorage` key **`active-page-v1`** (`ACTIVE_PAGE_STORAGE_KEY`), default **`'statements'`**.
- **UI**: a top **`segmented page-switch`** toggles the three modes (labels: 거래명세 관리 / 월 마감회의 / 입출고 현황).
- **Mounting**: one ternary chain — **`statements`** renders the large inline statements UI; **`meeting`** → `<MonthlyMeetingPage />`; else → `<InventoryStatusPage />` (see end of `App.tsx` around the `activePage === 'statements' / 'meeting'` branch).
- **Secondary view (statements only)**: **`activeView`** is `'records' | 'summary'` (records vs summary); it is **not** tied to `active-page-v1` in the snippets reviewed (state-only).

---

### 2) Where `localStorage` persistence lives

| Area | Keys / pattern |
|------|----------------|
| **`App.tsx`** | `statement-records-v1`, `pricing-rules-v1`, `active-page-v1`, statement template keys (`statement-template-*-v1`), etc. Loads with **`isRecordsStorageReady` / `isPricingStorageReady`** gates; **`useEffect`** w
